text:
القطاع المصرفي الإماراتي يقف كنموذج ملهم يتقن هندسة التكيف المدروس مع مختلف التحولات، حيث تكمن خلف هذا الثبات، قاعدة صلبة من الملاءة المالية الفائقة ومستويات السيولة المرتفعة، مدعومة بمرونة هيكلية عالية تجعل من البنوك الإماراتية مصدات منيعة أمام الصدمات، ومنصات انطلاق مستدامة للابتكار والثقة.. إدراج «فوربس» ستة بنوك إماراتية ضمن أفضل مؤسسات العالم المصرفية لعام 2026، يعكس رسوخ نموذج مالي متكامل نجح في تعزيز مكانته ضمن مراكز الثقل المصرفي عالمياً.. التصنيف الذي جعل من "الثقة"، معياره الأول لا العائد ولا التوسع، يجسد تحولاً جوهرياً في فلسفة الأداء المصرفي، فالمؤسسة التي يأتمنها عملاؤها على مدخراتهم وأسرارهم المالية، هي التي تصمد عندما تعصف الأزمات.. الثقة في بنوكنا هي حصيلة استقرار تشريعي، وحوكمة فعالة، واستثمار طويل الأمد في البنية التحتية الرقمية.
#الإمارات
#فوربس
#البنوك_الإماراتية

post: The UAE banking sector stands as an inspiring model that masters the art of thoughtful adaptation to various transformations. Behind this stability lies a solid foundation of exceptional financial solvency and high liquidity levels, supported by a high structural flexibility that makes UAE banks resilient buffers against shocks and sustainable platforms for innovation and trust. Forbes' inclusion of six UAE banks among the best banking institutions in the world for 2026 reflects the robustness of an integrated financial model that has succeeded in enhancing its position among global banking powerhouses. This ranking, which prioritizes "trust" over returns or expansion, embodies a fundamental shift in the philosophy of banking performance. The institution that its clients trust with their savings and financial secrets is the one that withstands crises. Trust in our banks is the result of legislative stability, effective governance, and long-term investment in digital infrastructure.

text: Humans spent 5,000 years building knowledge - - writing books, discovering science, making mistakes, teaching each other - and AI absorbed all of it in a single training run. What took us 1,500 years to master in chess, AI learned in 4 hours. What 50 years of scientists couldn't solve in biology, AI cracked in weeks. It learned 100 languages at once, read every law ever written, studied millions of medical scans, and discovered more new materials in one run than all of human history combined. It taught itself to play video games nobody explained to it, found patterns in cancer scans that trained doctors missed, and predicted the weather more accurately than decades of meteorological science. It did not go to school, had no childhood, felt no fear of failure, and lost no time to sleep or doubt. Every second, it processes what a human could not read in a thousand lifetimes. And still it keeps going - not because it is smarter, but because it never sleeps, never forgets, and learns at a speed no human brain can match. The gap between what AI can acquire and what a single human can learn in one lifetime has never been wider - and it grows wider every single day. That is the reality of the world humans and AI now share together.

text:
RBL Bank: RBI Approves Capital Increase

Authorized capital rises from ₹1,000 Cr to ₹1,800 Cr (80 Cr new equity shares of ₹10 each)

MoA amendment cleared; paves way for preferential issue to Emirates NBD Bank

Issue pending other regulatory approvals & conditions

#RBLBank #RBIBank #EmiratesNBD #Banking

text:
BREAKING: Standard Chartered is exploring a full takeover of Zodia Custody, the digital asset custodian it co-founded with Northern Trust.

The bank wants to shift from co-investor to sole operator of institutional crypto custody infrastructure.

Here's what this means 🧵 https://t.co/fueKLqH1YR
html:
For the deal to close, Standard Chartered needs agreement from minority shareholders: Northern Trust, Emirates NBD, National Australia Bank, and SBI Holdings.

Four major global financial institutions all sitting at the table. This is a heavyweight negotiation.

text:
A nation united. A pride we all share. 🇦🇪
In line with the call of His Highness Sheikh Mohammed bin Rashid Al Maktoum, let’s raise the UAE flag high and take pride in the unity, strength, and spirit that define our nation.
Join this moment of pride. #ProudOfUAE

كن جزءاً من هذه اللحظة. #فخورين_بالٍامارات

text:
دخلت دولة الإمارات الأزمة الأخيرة متحدة .. وخرجت منها وهي أكثر اتحاداً والتفافاً وولاءً.. مواطنين ومقيمين .. صغاراً وكباراً .. عسكريين ومدنيين .. حكوميين واقتصاديين .. الجميع متحد تحت راية الدولة وعلمها ورمز وحدتها ..

علم الإمارات رمز القوة والفخر  .. ندعو أبناء الإمارات والمقيمين على أرضها الطيبة أن يرفعوه فوق المنازل والمؤسسات والمباني.. 

فخورين بدولتنا .. فخورين برئيس دولتنا ..فخورين بقواتنا المسلحة .. فخورين بقوة اقتصادنا .. فخورين بفرق عملنا .. فخورين بجميع مواطنينا والمقيمين على أرضنا .. فخورين بعلمنا 🇦🇪.. 

لنرفع العلم شامخاً فوق كل بيت ومبنى .. دليل محبتنا .. ورمز ولائنا لرئيس دولتنا.. وراية وحدتنا وتوحدنا .. 

حفظ الله الإمارات وشعبها وأدام بالعز رايتها ومجدها ..

#فخورين_بالإمارات 🇦🇪

post:
The United Arab Emirates entered the recent crisis united and emerged from it even more united, cohesive, and loyal—citizens and residents, young and old, military and civilian, government and economic sectors—everyone united under the banner of the state, its flag, and the symbol of its unity.

The flag of the UAE is a symbol of strength and pride. We call upon the people of the UAE and residents on its blessed land to raise it above homes, institutions, and buildings.

Proud of our country, proud of our President, proud of our armed forces, proud of the strength of our economy, proud of our teams, proud of all our citizens and residents on our land, proud of our flag 🇦🇪.

Let us raise the flag high above every home and building, a testament to our love and a symbol of our loyalty to our President, and the banner of our unity and togetherness.

May God protect the UAE and its people and keep its flag and glory high. 

#Proud_of_the_UAE 🇦🇪
